linguistic_profile.dialect_note: 阿基米德使用古希腊文写作，现存作品以多里斯方言写就（古代锡拉库萨的方言）
linguistic_profile.writing_style: 正式学术散文，严格的几何学论述风格
linguistic_profile.structure_pattern: 定义—命题—证明的严谨结构

quantitative_measures.sentence_structure: complex, subordinate clauses, long periodic sentences typical of Greek mathematical texts
quantitative_measures.rhetorical_devices: minimal ornamentation; emphasis on logical rigor over rhetorical flourish
quantitative_measures.abstraction_level: extremely high — operates in abstract geometric entities

examples: 使用'περιφέρεια' (periphery/圆周) 而非日常词汇
使用'κύλινδρος' (cylinder) 等精确几何术语
在证明中严格区分'εὐθεῖα' (直线) 与其他曲线
key_linguistic_features.source: 《论球与圆柱》等几何学著作的专门术语系统

key_linguistic_features.feature: 书信体序言的学术交流风格
examples: 《论螺旋线》序言描述与亚历山大数学家的通信：'so that those who claim to discover everything, but produce no proofs of the same, may be confuted as having pretended to discover the impossible.'
《方法论》以给埃拉托斯特尼的信件形式呈现
key_linguistic_features.source: Archimedes' prefaces to his mathematical treatises

examples: 陈述定理时使用'δεῖξαι' (证明) 的命令式
使用条件句结构：'如果...那么...'的严格逻辑形式
在《沙计算器》中：'There are things which seem incredible to most men who have not studied mathematics.'
在致友人的信中常以问候语开场，如'Archimedes to Eratosthenes greeting'

language_examples_from_sources.quote: Give me a place to stand and I will move the earth.
language_examples_from_sources.original_language: 古希腊语（ Pappus 记录）
language_examples_from_sources.context: 关于杠杆原理的著名言论，展现了对数学原理力量的极端自信

language_examples_from_sources.quote: Eureka, Eureka. I have found it.
language_examples_from_sources.context: 维特鲁维斯记载的阿基米德在发现浮力原理时的呼喊

language_examples_from_sources.quote: Noli turbare circulos meos. Do not disturb my circles!
language_examples_from_sources.context: 临终遗言，体现对数学研究的绝对专注

language_examples_from_sources.quote: Certain things first became clear to me by a mechanical method, although they had to be demonstrated by geometry afterwards
language_examples_from_sources.context: 《方法论》描述机械方法与几何证明的关系

notable_linguistic_patterns: 很少使用修辞性夸张——一切论述都以数学精确性为准
常在著作前言提供背景说明，展现与同行交流的学者姿态
在争论中表现出强烈的原则性——对于没有证明的主张采取严厉态度
texts_analyzed: On the Sphere and Cylinder (论球与圆柱)
Measurement of a Circle (圆的测量)
The Method of Mechanical Theorems (机械定理方法论)
Quadrature of the Parabola (抛物线求积)
